reference: My name is Savitri, and I am fifty-five years old. I have had leg pain for the last four years. When I sit for a long time or walk for some time, I feel unbearable pain and a burning sensation. I have taken Ayurvedic and allopathic medicines, but there has been no result. I am feeling hopeless. What should I do?
text: I think he could now take his health into his own hands.
